treaties.title: Mutual Recognition Accord —网络共和国
treaties.summary: Establishes mutual recognition of citizen credentials, shared anti-fraud measures, and consular referral channels.

treaties.title: Interoperability & Data-Sovereignty Pact
treaties.summary: Defines data-residency requirements, cross-border incident reporting, and standard API surface definitions.

treaties.title: Consular Cooperation Agreement
treaties.summary: Enables honorary consular officers, document authentication workflows, and citizen-support call routing.

treaties.title: Observer Status — Digital Standards Consortium
treaties.summary: Grants AETHERIA observer rights in standards proceedings, with voting rights on technical amendments.

treaties.title: Passport Reciprocity Notice — Micronation Fellowship
treaties.summary: Recommends favorable treatment for AETHERIA passport holders; no binding visa-waiver obligation.

multilateral.title: Digital States Caucus — UN CSW
multilateral.topic: Digital-state participation in UN civil-society mechanisms

multilateral.title: Open Government Partnership — Digital Track
multilateral.topic: Open-data commitments and participatory budgeting standards

multilateral.title: Micronation Education Alliance
multilateral.topic: Curriculum exchange, mutual accreditation, and student mobility
